videos.title: I CAN'T BELIEVE this is ETHIOPIA! Addis Ababa Wasn’t What I Expected 🇪🇹
videos.description:
Why are we not shown these images in the media?  Everyone I speak to at home STILL has an idea of Ethiopia from the 80's and it simply isn't like that anymore.  In this video I'll show you what Addis Ababa is really like.  #addisababa #ethiopiatravel #ethiopianfood

Addis Ababa Travel Guide 2026 Hotel Tour, Food, Parks & Culture 

This is a travel vlog about Addis Ababa, the capital city of Ethiopia. I show real places in the city from inside the Sheraton Addis hotel to the increidible local parks like Friendship Park, plus sky restaurant Marcus Addis.

You watch Ethiopian breakfast food with injera, stews, fresh juices, and local coffee. I walk around the streets with electric cars and see how the city is growing with new buildings and parks. 

I visit the National Palace and see the best display of hvintage cars I have seen in a long time. You also see food at Marcus Addis' restaurant with steak and local dishes. This travel video mixes hotel tour, food, parks, and culture to help you learn about Addis Ababa. Like and subscribe for more travel videos about Ethiopia.

videos.title: The Layover That Turned Into the Best Trip of My Life! Addis Ababa, Ethiopia  🇪🇹
videos.description:
I almost skipped Addis Ababa entirely. Like most people passing through, I was just going to transit through the airport and move on. But this time I decided to stop and what I found completely caught me off guard and changed the way I see Africa forever.

In this video I spend 24 hours exploring Ethiopia’s capital city, a place that is rapidly transforming into one of the most exciting cities in the world. From Africa’s biggest market to world class jazz bars, incredible leather handbags, Ethiopian coffee culture, ancient history and some of the most welcoming people I have ever met, Addis Ababa is not a city to skip.

🇪🇹 WHAT WE GET UP TO:
00:00 — Introduction
00:49 — Breakfast with our Airbnb host
02:08 — National Museum of Ethiopia and Lucy
02:40 — Ethiopian Coffee Culture
03:49 — Unity Park
04:17 — Mercato, Africa’s biggest market
13:44 — Ethiopian fashion and leather handbags
15:01 — Dinner and Ethiopian wine
16:49 — Fendika jazz bar

✨ TOURS I BOOKED ✨
Mercato Tour: https://gyg.me/fZuBiGtS

Find me on Instagram and TikTok where I post daily:
► Instagram: @orianafindlay 
► TikTok: @orianafindlay

🏠 PLACE I STAYED 🏠 
https://booking.tpo.li/mJ6Ozp8S

Get in touch:
► Website: www.orianafindlay.com
► Email: info@orianafindlay.com

videos.title: I Spent 5 Days in Ethiopia 🇪🇹 | Addis Ababa Changed Me
videos.description:
This trip to Ethiopia started in Mombasa and unfolded into one of the most meaningful weeks of my life.
From landing at Bole International Airport, exploring Addis Ababa, visiting Friendship Park, Abrehot Library, and the National Museum, to road-tripping to Bishoftu: the seven-lake city, this journey was filled with quiet moments, cultural discovery, music, food, and deep human connection.
I experienced Ethiopian coffee for the first time, tried injera (and raw meat 😅), learned the meaning behind Ethiopian names, wore a handmade Ethiopian dress, and saw the city from rooftops, churches, markets, and night drives.
Some days I was surrounded by people, other days I was completely alone.
And in between, Ethiopia showed me kindness, warmth, and beauty in ways I didn’t expect.
This video is a reflection: soft, honest, and personal.

Thank you, Ethiopia.
Till next time. 🤍
